hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.swift$'; then swiftformat "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi
FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(storyboard|xib)$'; then echo 'No storyboards or XIBs allowed in this project' >&2; exit 2; fi
CMD=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git push.*(main|master)'; then echo 'Direct push to main is not allowed. Create a branch first.' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if [ "$(echo $INPUT | jq -r '.stop_hook_active')" = 'true' ]; then exit 0; fi; cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && xcodebuild test -scheme Programmatic-UI -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' -quiet 2>&1 | tail -5
